name: Bitewise Editorial Premium

typography.principle: Editorial serif for identity and key outcomes; sans-serif for controls and data.

marks.bitewise: BW: B plus W made from two interlocking checks
marks.snackswap: SW: S plus the same double-check W
marks.wordmarkRule: The w in Bitewise and SnackSwap is always the navy/gold double-check W.

productImagery: No product images are assumed. Use name, brand, category, barcode and nutrition metadata.
